name: Handshake
desc: The very first packet sent by the client. Initiates the connection and requests a protocol state transition.

name: Login Start
desc: Starts the login process by sending the player's GameProfile (username) to the server.

name: Encryption Response
desc: Responds to the server's encryption request with the shared secret (RSA-encrypted with the server's public key) and verify token.

name: Login Disconnect
desc: Kicks the client during the login phase with a JSON chat component reason message (e.g. 'You are banned', 'Server is full').

name: Encryption Request
desc: Requests the client to enable encryption by sending the server's RSA public key, a verify token (random challenge), and server ID for Mojang session auth.

name: Login Success
desc: Confirms successful authentication. Contains the player's UUID and username. Transitions the connection state from LOGIN to PLAY.

name: Enable Compression
desc: Enables zlib compression for all subsequent packets. Sets the compression threshold — packets >= this size are compressed.

name: Status Request
desc: Requests the server's status (MOTD, player count, favicon, protocol version). Empty packet with no payload.

name: Ping
desc: Sends a client-side timestamp for the server to echo back. The client calculates round-trip latency from the difference.

name: Server Status
desc: Responds to C00PacketServerQuery with the server's status as a JSON string (MOTD, players, version, favicon, mod info).

name: Pong
desc: Echoes back the exact client timestamp from C01PacketPing. The client calculates round-trip latency from the difference.

name: Keep Alive (Response)
desc: Response to S00PacketKeepAlive. The client echoes back the server's keep-alive ID.

name: Chat Message
desc: Sends a chat message or command from the client to the server.

name: Use Entity
desc: Player interacts with (attacks or right-clicks) an entity.

name: Player
desc: Updates the player's position on the server. Has subclasses for different update types.

name: Player Digging
desc: Player starts/cancels/ends mining a block, or drops an item (press Q).

name: Player Block Placement
desc: Player places a block or uses an item. Can also be used for empty-hand interactions (e.g., pressing buttons).

name: Held Item Change
desc: Player changes their selected hotbar slot.

name: Animation
desc: Player swings their arm (left click or server-side swing). Empty packet with no payload.

name: Entity Action
desc: Player performs an action: crouch, uncrouch, sprint, stop sprint, leave bed, jump with horse, open inventory.

name: Input
desc: Player steers a vehicle (boat or horse). Sends sideways/forward movement, jump flag, and unmount flag.

name: Close Window
desc: Player closes an inventory window (chest, crafting table, furnace, etc).

name: Click Window
desc: Player clicks in an inventory window. Handles item moves: pickup, shift-click, number key swap, middle click, drop, drag init, and double-click.

name: Confirm Transaction
desc: Client confirms receipt of a S32PacketConfirmTransaction (server inventory transaction).

name: Creative Inventory Action
desc: Player sets the contents of a slot in creative mode. Used to spawn items or modify inventory contents directly.

name: Enchant Item
desc: Player selects an enchantment option in the enchanting table window. Carries window ID and button (0=top, 1=middle, 2=bottom).

name: Update Sign
desc: Player finishes editing a sign. Sends the block position and four lines of text as IChatComponents.

name: Player Abilities
desc: Player toggles flying state. Only sent for the flying flag change — the server controls all other ability flags via S39PacketPlayerAbilities.

name: Tab Complete
desc: Player presses Tab in chat to request auto-completion. Sends the partial message or command.

name: Client Settings
desc: Client sends its locale, view distance, chat mode, chat colors, difficulty preference, and cape visibility.

name: Client Status
desc: Client sends a status update: respawn after death or open inventory (to achieve).

name: Custom Payload (Plugin Message)
desc: Sends a plugin channel message from client to server. Used for mod communication.

name: Spectate
desc: Spectator mode player teleports to another entity or player by UUID. Only works in spectator gamemode (3).

name: Resource Pack Status
desc: Client reports the resource pack load status to the server. Sent after S48PacketResourcePackSend.

name: Keep Alive (Request)
desc: Server sends a keep-alive ID that the client must echo back in C00PacketKeepAlive.

name: Join Game
desc: Welcomes the player into the world. Sends entity ID, gamemode, dimension, difficulty, max players, world type, and reduced debug info.

name: Chat Message
desc: Server sends a chat message or command response to the client.

name: Time Update
desc: Synchronizes the world time (total world age and day/night cycle time). Sent every few seconds or when time accelerates (sleeping).

name: Entity Equipment
desc: Updates an entity's equipped item in a specific slot (main hand, armor slots).

name: Spawn Position
desc: Sets the player's spawn position (where compass points and respawn occurs).

name: Update Health
desc: Updates the player's health, food level, and saturation. Sent ~20 times per second during combat.

name: Respawn
desc: Sends respawn or dimension change request. The client must reload the world (clear chunks, entities) and re-sync position.

name: Player Position & Look
desc: Forces the player to a specific position and rotation. The client must respond with a C04/05/06.

name: Held Item Change
desc: Server confirms the player's held item slot change (echo back of C09).

name: Use Bed
desc: Makes the player lie down in a bed at the specified position.

name: Animation
desc: Broadcasts entity animation (arm swing, damage, etc.) to nearby players.

name: Spawn Player
desc: Spawns another player entity in the world with UUID, position (fixed-point int × 32), rotation (byte × 256/360), held item, and metadata.

name: Collect Item
desc: Shows an item being collected (picked up) by a player entity. Plays the pickup animation.

name: Spawn Object
desc: Spawns a non-living entity: item drop, boat, minecart, arrow, fireball, ender pearl, armor stand, etc.

name: Spawn Mob
desc: Spawns a living entity (mob/animal/monster) with entity type, position, rotation, velocity, and metadata.

name: Spawn Painting
desc: Spawns a painting entity with type, position, and facing direction.

name: Spawn Experience Orb
desc: Spawns an experience orb entity with position and XP value.

name: Entity Velocity
desc: Sets an entity's velocity (e.g., from knockback, explosion, piston push).

name: Destroy Entities
desc: Removes one or more entities from the client's render list.

name: Entity
desc: Base class for entity relative movement and rotation updates. Subclasses S15 (rel move), S16 (look), S17 (move+look).

name: Entity Teleport
desc: Teleports an entity to an absolute position (fixed-point int × 32) and rotation.

name: Entity Head Look
desc: Updates an entity's head yaw rotation independently of body rotation.

name: Entity Status
desc: Sends a status event for an entity (death sound, hurt effect, taming, wolf shaking, etc.).

name: Entity Attach
desc: Attaches an entity to another (player on horse, animal on leash, leach knot).

name: Entity Metadata
desc: Updates an entity's DataWatcher metadata (health, skin, flags, name, etc.).

name: Entity Effect
desc: Applies a status/potion effect to an entity.

name: Remove Entity Effect
desc: Removes a potion effect from an entity.

name: Set Experience
desc: Updates the player's experience bar (level, total XP, progress).

name: Entity Properties
desc: Updates an entity's generic attributes (movement speed, max health, knockback resistance, etc.).

name: Chunk Data
desc: Sends a chunk section (16x16x16 blocks) with compressed block data, light values, and biome info.

name: Multi Block Change
desc: Updates multiple blocks within a single chunk. More efficient than sending many S23 packets.

name: Block Change
desc: Updates a single block in the world — position and new block state (combined ID+metadata).

name: Block Action
desc: Triggers a block action animation/event (chest open, piston extend, note block play, etc.).

name: Block Break Animation
desc: Shows block break progress (crack stages 0-9) on a block. Sent by all players, not just the miner.

name: Map Chunk Bulk
desc: Sends multiple chunks at once. Used for initial world load and large area updates.

name: Explosion
desc: Server notifies the client of an explosion (TNT, creeper, bed in Nether/End, etc).

name: Effect
desc: Plays a sound effect or particle effect at a position (without a named sound).

name: Sound Effect
desc: Plays a named sound at a world position with volume and pitch.

name: Particles
desc: Spawns particle effects at a position with offset, speed, and count.

name: Change Game State
desc: Changes a global game state: rain toggle, gamemode change, credits, demo messages, elder guardian effect.

name: Spawn Global Entity
desc: Spawns a global entity visible to all players (lightning bolt).

name: Open Window
desc: Opens an inventory GUI window (chest, crafting table, furnace, enchantment table, etc.) with window ID, type, title, and slot count.

name: Close Window
desc: Server forces the client to close an inventory window.

name: Set Slot
desc: Sets a single slot in an inventory window. Used for cursor updates, specific slot changes, and armor slot updates.

name: Window Items
desc: Sends the full contents of an inventory window — all slots at once. Used for initial container opening and rejected transaction recovery.

name: Window Property
desc: Updates a single property in a container (enchantment level, furnace burn time, brewing progress, etc.).

name: Confirm Transaction
desc: Server confirms or rejects an inventory transaction from C0EPacketClickWindow. accepted=false causes client to revert inventory.

name: Update Sign
desc: Updates a sign's text for all nearby players.

name: Maps
desc: Updates a map item's data (pixels, colors).

name: Update Tile Entity
desc: Updates NBT data for a tile entity (sign, skull, beacon, command block, etc.).

name: Sign Editor Open
desc: Opens the sign editor GUI for a specific sign position.

name: Statistics
desc: Updates statistic values (walk distance, damage dealt, items crafted, etc.).

name: Player List Item
desc: Adds, updates, or removes entries from the tab player list. Used for player join/leave, gamemode changes, ping updates, and display name changes.

name: Player Abilities
desc: Server updates the player's capabilities (flying, invulnerable, creative, fly speed, walk speed).

name: Tab Complete
desc: Server responds to C14PacketTabComplete with a list of matching commands/player names.

name: Scoreboard Objective
desc: Creates or removes a scoreboard objective (the scoreboard itself, not individual scores).

name: Update Score
desc: Updates a single scoreboard entry (add, remove, or change score value).

name: Display Scoreboard
desc: Sets which scoreboard objective is displayed in a position (sidebar, list, below name).

name: Teams
desc: Create/update/remove a scoreboard team. Manages team name, prefix/suffix, players, friendly fire, and nametag visibility.

name: Custom Payload (Plugin Message)
desc: Sends a plugin channel message from server to client. Used for mod/plugin communication.

name: Disconnect (Play)
desc: Kicks the player from the server during gameplay with a JSON chat component reason message.

name: Server Difficulty
desc: Informs client of the server's difficulty setting.

name: Combat Event
desc: Server sends combat-related events: enter combat, end combat, entity dead with death message.

name: Camera
desc: Sets the player's camera to spectate a specific entity (spectator mode teleport).

name: World Border
desc: Updates the world border (center, size, warning distance/buffer, damping).

name: Title
desc: Displays titles/subtitles on screen with animation timing. Actions: TITLE, SUBTITLE, TIMES, CLEAR, RESET.

name: Set Compression Level
desc: Changes the compression threshold mid-game. Same as S03 but for PLAY state.

name: Player List Header Footer
desc: Sets text above and below the tab player list.

name: Resource Pack Send
desc: Sends a resource pack URL and hash. Client downloads and applies it.

name: Update Entity NBT
desc: Updates the NBT data of an entity (used for command block minecarts, spawned entities with custom NBT).
